system.rateLimitedUser: вҸі You're sending commands too fast! Please wait **{retryAfter}s** before using another command.
system.rateLimitedGuild: вҸі This server is sending too many commands! Please wait **{retryAfter}s** before using another command.

reminder.failedDelete: [REMINDER] Failed to delete reminder from store:
reminder.failedCleanup: [REMINDER] Failed to clean up dispatched reminder:

remindme.noInput:
вқҢ Please provide a time and reminder message.
Usage: `!remindme in 5 minutes Take a break`
Examples:
`!remindme in 30 minutes Check the oven`
`!remindme tomorrow at 9am Team meeting`
`!remindme in 2 hours Walk the dog`
remindme.invalidTime:
вқҢ Could not parse time. Try something like:
`in 5 minutes`, `tomorrow at 3pm`, `15 seconds`
remindme.pastTime: вқҢ Time must be in the future.

define.noWord: Please provide a word to look up.
define.error: An error occurred while fetching the word definition.

thesaurus.noWord: Please provide a word to look up.
thesaurus.error: An error occurred while fetching the word definition.

translate.noInput: Please provide a language code and text. Example: `!translate es Hello` or `!translate fr:es Bonjour`

wiki.error: An error occurred while fetching the Wikipedia article.

roll.plainResult: рҹҺІ You rolled **{result}** on a **{sides}**-sided die
roll.error: вқҢ Invalid dice format. Try e.g. `2d20+6`, `d8`, or just `20`.

8ball.noQuestion:
рҹҺұ Please ask a yes/no question.
Usage: `!8ball Will I win the lottery?`

slap.userNotFound: вқҢ Could not find that user.
slap.generationFailed: вқҢ Failed to generate slap animation.

bean.userNotFound: вқҢ Could not find that user.
bean.userRequired:
вқҢ Please specify a user to bean.
Usage: `!bean @user [reason]`

wheelspin.noOptions:
вқҢ Please provide at least two options.
Usage: `!wheelspin pizza sushi tacos`

calc.noExpression:
вқҢ Please provide an expression to evaluate.
Usage: `!calc <expression>`
calc.invalidExpression: вқҢ Invalid expression. Use numbers and operators like `+`, `-`, `*`, `/`, `^`, `()`

color.noColor:
вқҢ Please provide a hex color.
Usage: `!color FF5733`
color.invalid: вқҢ Invalid hex color. Use format like `FF5733` or `#FF5733`.
color.parseError: Invalid hex color. Use format like FF5733 or #FF5733.

currency.noInput:
вқҢ Please provide an amount, source currency, and target currency.
Usage: `!currency 100 usd eur`
currency.invalidAmount: вқҢ Invalid amount. Please provide a positive number.
currency.error: An error occurred while fetching exchange rates.

echo.noInput:
вқҢ Please provide something to echo.
Usage: `!echo Hello, world!`

iss.error: An error occurred while fetching ISS data.

qrcode.noInput:
вқҢ Please provide text or a URL to encode.
Usage: `!qrcode https://example.com`
qrcode.tooLong: вқҢ Input too long ({length} chars). Maximum is {max} characters.
qrcode.failed: вқҢ Failed to generate QR code.

timestamp.noInput:
вқҢ Please provide a date or time.
Usage: `!timestamp tomorrow at 3pm`
timestamp.invalid: вқҢ Sorry, I couldn't understand that time format.

uptime.result: рҹӨ– Bot has been up for **{formatted}**

purge.discordOnly: вқҢ The purge command is only available as a Discord slash command.
purge.notAvailable: вқҢ Cannot purge messages in this channel.
purge.botMissingPerms: вқҢ I need the **Manage Messages** permission to purge.
purge.userMissingPerms: вқҢ You need the **Manage Messages** permission to purge messages.
purge.invalidAmount: вқҢ Please provide a valid number of messages to purge (1-100).
purge.tooMany: вқҢ You can only purge up to **100** messages at a time.
purge.noMessages: вқҢ No messages found to purge.
purge.successUser: вң… Purged **{count}** messages from that user.
purge.skippedOldUser: вҡ пёҸ {count} message(s) skipped (older than 14 days).

ratelimit.notOwner: вқҢ Only bot operators can change platform-wide rate limits.
ratelimit.notSet: в„№пёҸ No platform-wide override is currently set.
ratelimit.invalidValue: вқҢ Please provide a valid positive number.
ratelimit.unknownAction: вқҢ Unknown action `{action}`. Use `system ratelimit` to view, or `system ratelimit user <n>`, `system ratelimit guild <n>`, or `system ratelimit reset`.
ratelimit.updatedUser: вң… Platform-wide user limit set to **{limit}** commands per minute.
ratelimit.updatedGuild: вң… Platform-wide guild limit set to **{limit}** commands per minute.
ratelimit.updatedReset: вң… Platform-wide override cleared. Env defaults will be used.

presence.notOwner: вқҢ Only the bot owner can change my presence.
presence.usage:
вқҢ Usage: `system presence <status>`
Statuses: `online`, `idle`, `dnd`, `invisible`
Example: `system presence dnd`
presence.invalid: вқҢ Invalid status. Use one of: `online`, `idle`, `dnd`, `invisible`
presence.notAvailable: вқҢ This platform doesn't support presence updates.

status.notOwner: вқҢ Only the bot owner can change my status.
status.usage:
вқҢ Usage: `system status <text>`
Example: `system status рҹ”§ Maintenance mode`
status.notAvailable: вқҢ This platform doesn't support status updates.

trends.notOwner: вқҢ Only bot operators can view trends.
trends.noData: рҹ“Ҡ No trend data recorded yet.

rep.guildOnly: вқҢ This command can only be used in a server.
rep.usage: вқҢ Usage: `!rep @user` to give a reputation point.
rep.selfRep: вқҢ You can't give yourself a reputation point.
rep.givenDescription: **{giver}** gave a rep point to **{receiver}**! They now have **{rep} rep**.
rep.botRep: рҹӨ– You can't give reputation points to bots.
rep.dailyAllowanceExhausted: вҸі You've used all **3** of your daily reputation tokens! Come back in 24 hours.
rep.targetLockout: рҹ”’ You've already repped this user recently. You can give them rep again in **{time}**.

profile.guildOnly: вқҢ This command can only be used in a server.
profile.title: рҹ‘Ө {username}
profile.noXp: This user hasn't earned any XP yet.
profile.noRep: This user hasn't earned any rep yet.

leaderboard.guildOnly: вқҢ This command can only be used in a server.
leaderboard.noData: рҹҸҶ No XP data yet вҖ” start chatting to earn XP!
leaderboard.noRepData: вӯҗ No rep data yet вҖ” use `!rep @user` to give rep!
leaderboard.title: рҹҸҶ Server Leaderboard

xp.guildOnly: вқҢ This command can only be used in a server.
xp.helpDescription:
**Subcommands:**
`xp set <user> <amount>` вҖ” Set a user's XP (admin)
`xp add <user> <amount>` вҖ” Add XP to a user (admin)
`xp globalnotify [on/off]` вҖ” Toggle server announcements (admin)
`xp bonus add <word> <xp>` вҖ” Add keyword bonus (admin)
`xp bonus remove <word>` вҖ” Remove keyword bonus (admin)
`xp bonus list` вҖ” List all keyword bonuses
xp.unknownSubcommand: вқҢ Unknown subcommand `{sub}`. Use `!xp` to see available commands.
xp.noPermission: вқҢ You don't have permission to use this subcommand.
xp.globalnotifyNoChange: рҹ”” Server level-up announcements are already **{status}**.
xp.invalidAmount: вқҢ Invalid XP amount. Please provide a positive number.
xp.addResult: вң… Added **{amount} XP** to <@{userId}> вҖ” now at **{xp} XP** (Level {level})
xp.bonusNoBonuses: рҹ“қ No keyword bonuses configured for this server.
xp.bonusAdded: вң… Bonus keyword `{keyword}` set for **{xpAmount} XP**.

levelnotify.guildOnly: вқҢ This command can only be used in a server.
levelnotify.currentStatus: рҹ”” Your level-up notifications are currently **{status}**.

neofetch.guildOnly: вқҢ This command can only be used in a community.

ratelimit.guildOnly: вқҢ This command can only be used in a server.
ratelimit.noPermission: вқҢ You need the **Manage Messages** permission to change rate limits.
ratelimit.unknownAction: вқҢ Unknown action `{action}`. Use `!ratelimit` to see current limits, or `!ratelimit user <n>`, `!ratelimit guild <n>`, or `!ratelimit reset`.
ratelimit.invalidValue: вқҢ Please provide a valid positive number.
ratelimit.updatedUser: вң… Per-user rate limit set to **{limit}** commands per minute.
ratelimit.updatedGuild: вң… Per-guild rate limit set to **{limit}** commands per minute.
ratelimit.updatedReset: вң… Rate limits reset to environment defaults.
ratelimit.tooHighUser: вқҢ Per-user limit can't exceed **{limit}** (the platform-wide maximum).
ratelimit.tooHighGuild: вқҢ Per-guild limit can't exceed **{limit}** (the platform-wide maximum).
ratelimit.footer: Use !ratelimit user <n> or !ratelimit guild <n> to change
